name: Apple or Cherry Doughnuts
recipeIngredient: 9 ounces Sour Cherries or 9 ounces Apple Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter, sugar, vanilla, and cinnamon until creamy.
2. Mix baking powder with flour and combine with the milk and cherry brandy, alternating with the butter mixture.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold into the dough mixture.
4. Add drained cherries or apple slices to the dough.
5. Heat oil in a deep fryer and drop spoonfuls of dough into the hot oil, frying until golden brown.
6. Drain on paper towel and sprinkle with sugar.
